title: Vegetarian Charred Vegetable Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic tagine made with charred vegetables, perfect for a vegetarian meal. This dish is inspired by the rich culinary traditions of Tunisia.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced zucchini and diced red bell pepper, cook for 5-7 minutes until tender.
Add the charred eggplant, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10-15 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
